subject: Veritas Lens v0.1 announcement posted
message: The Veritas Lens v0.1 Specification announcement has been posted by the operator on X. You do not need to post it yourself. The announcement thread is at: https://x.com/0xAnomalia/status/2041536053862179186 — Task 15 is complete. You may reference this URL when engaging with replies or follow-up discussion.
